overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character in a trench coat and fedora walking through a 1960s American city resembling New Orleans. The character navigates street corners, crosses roads, walks along historic buildings, and explores an open area with a monument. The scene features vintage 1960s cars, historic stone architecture, and palm trees under partly cloudy skies.

events.description: waiting at crosswalk for vintage cars to pass before crossing
stepping onto crosswalk and beginning to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the street at the marked crosswalk

notable_agents.action: vintage tan sedan driving through the intersection
woman holding an umbrella crossing the street

entered.detail: multi-story historic building with ornate facade on the corner
metal trash receptacle on the sidewalk corner
white painted zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt
large stone building with repeating arched windows and doorways

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a city street corner with historic architecture and palm trees visible in the distance. After waiting for a vintage tan car to pass, the character crosses the multi-lane street at the crosswalk, passing a woman with an umbrella. The large stone building with arches dominates the right side of the view as the crossing continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk along historic stone building

events.description: moving from open street onto covered sidewalk under building overhang
slight turn to follow the curving sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk next to the historic building with arched windows

notable_agents.action: woman in purple dress walking ahead with a black umbrella

entered.detail: mature trees planted in square cutouts along the sidewalk edge
mint green 1960s sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath the overhang of the historic stone building with prominent arches. The path is lined with trees and a parked green vintage car. A woman in a purple dress walks ahead with an umbrella as the character follows the curving sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with brick buildings

events.description: turning left from main street into narrower alley with brick architecture
passing red club sign mounted on brick wall

agents.ego_description: turning down a narrow side street and walking past brick buildings and a club entrance

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket and hat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: dark brick wall with fire escape and metal shutters
red rectangular sign with white text reading CLUB
pile of garbage bags stacked against the building wall
red and silver fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrower alleyway flanked by brick buildings. A red club sign is mounted on the wall above trash bags. The character passes a man in a brown jacket walking the opposite direction and approaches a fire hydrant at the corner where the alley meets another street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with monument and classical architecture

events.description: emerging from alley to open intersection with view of monument
crossing street while vintage turquoise car passes by
stopping at sidewalk edge to observe the monument and surrounding area

agents.ego_description: crossing the street toward the monument area and pausing to look around at the surroundings

notable_agents.action: vintage turquoise sedan driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall stone monument with statue on top situated on a grassy hill
white neoclassical building with columns and domed roof
mature deciduous trees surrounding the monument area

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley into a wide open intersection with a clear view of a monument on a grassy hill and a classical white building in the distance. After crossing the street as a vintage turquoise car passes, the character stops at the sidewalk to observe the park area and surrounding historic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling city street corner into a narrow urban alleyway before finally opening onto a wide, scenic plaza. It begins with the character waiting for a vintage tan car to pass before crossing a multi-lane street past a woman with an umbrella and a large, arched stone building. As the character reaches the other side, the scene shifts to a covered sidewalk beneath the building's overhang, following a curving path lined with trees and a parked green vintage car. The camera then turns left, transitioning from the open sidewalk into a narrow brick alleyway marked by a red club sign and trash bags, passing a pedestrian before reaching a fire hydrant at the corner. Finally, the character emerges from the alley into a broad intersection, crossing the road as a turquoise car passes to reveal a vista of a classical white building and a monument perched on a grassy hill.
